pages.raw_text:
Bids will be received by the board
of public works until noon May 81,
1908. for the construction of the
south approach of the Monroe street
bridge, in accordance with the plans
and specifications approved by the
council February II, 1908, and on file
in this office.


Proposals to be made In duplicate
one copy addressed to the mayor. the
other. with a certified check for not
less than 10 per cent of the amount
OF the bid. to the secretary of the
board. The successful bidder will be
panyS bond of an amount equal to
the amount of the contract. also such
other bonds as the laws OF the state
of Washington requires.


Separate bids will be received. at
the same time. for the construction
OF piers and abuttment walls under
the south approach of the Monroe
street bridge In accordance with the
plans and specifications adopted by
the city council on February II 1908,
and on file in this office. These bids
to be made in duplicate. one addressed
to the mayor and the other, with GER
titled check for not less than 10 per
cent of the amount OF the bid, to the
secretary of the board. Bonds will
be required for this work under the
same conditions as specified for the
bridge approach, The attention OF
bidders Is called to Ordinance No.
Al03l passed February 10. 1901. re
lating to contracts. The board re-
serves the right TO reject any and
all bids. Proposals publicly opened
at O'Clock same date


l. u. HANDLEY. Secretary.
